creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #6)
> Nothing is decided yet.
Where, and by whom? Can I participate?

> I find this kind of picky. If a certain maintainer wants _some_
> issues to be reported in GitHub, so be it.
If the maintainer wants to use github, IMHO it should be the WWW.
But that decision shouldn't trump FreeBSD pr(1) (Bugzilla).

> But the main project's problem report database is Bugzilla.
Agreed.

To be fair; I can agree that it would be more efficient to
consolidate such efforts. But I'm not convinced Github is
the solution. Not to mention all the history the FreeBSD
pr(1) system already has for cross reference(s).
